phrases.intent_en: Is the museum open this afternoon?
phrases.text_local: Le musée est ouvert cet après-midi ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh myoo-ZAY eh oo-VAIR set ah-preh mee-DEE
phrases.cultural_note: Hours and special closures can change with exhibition turnover.

phrases.intent_en: How much is one adult ticket?
phrases.text_local: C'est combien pour un billet adulte ?
phrases.pronunciation: say kom-BYAN poor uhn bee-YAY ah-DULT
phrases.cultural_note: Ask for reduced rates if eligible—many museums have discount categories.

phrases.intent_en: Which exhibition is on right now?
phrases.text_local: Quelle exposition est en cours en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eks-poh-zee-SYON eh on koor on suh moh-MON
phrases.cultural_note: Temporary exhibitions may change the suggested visit route.

phrases.text_local: Les photos sont autorisées à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay FOH-to son oh-toh-ree-ZAY ah lan-tay-ree-UHR
phrases.cultural_note: If allowed, avoid flash and respect posted restrictions.

phrases.intent_en: How long should I plan for the visit?
phrases.text_local: Je prévois combien de temps pour la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh pray-VWA kom-BYAN duh tahn poor lah vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: Plan about 45–60 minutes for a standard museum visit.
